name: agent-swarm
description: Orchestration skill: make the current session a controller that spawns Codex/Claude/Hermes worker agents in tmux, tracks them in a TSV registry, tails logs, sends input, and reviews output.

interface.shortDescription: Spawn and track Codex/Claude/Hermes worker agents
interface.longDescription: Make the current session an orchestrator: split work into bounded worker prompts, spawn tmux-backed Codex/Claude/Hermes/shell workers, monitor logs, send follow-up input, and review results.
defaultPrompt: Use agent-swarm. Act as the orchestrator: split the task into bounded worker prompts, spawn workers, monitor them, review outputs, and report running/completed/blocked agents plus required user action.
